hero.title: Authentic
hero.description: A refined guide to Hamburg for Muslim travellers, with halal-friendly food tours, heritage walks, and carefully researched city experiences.
hero.imageAlt: Editorial illustration evoking a warm, premium Hamburg city atmosphere

intro.title: An authentic approach to
intro.description: We combine warm hospitality with real research: halal-vetted food stops, culturally rich walking routes, and a calmer introduction to Hamburg for guests who want clarity before they book.
intro.imageAlt: Editorial placeholder art for a warm, design-led travel introduction

positioning: Each experience is written and presented to answer the questions Muslim visitors actually have: where halal confidence comes from, what the pace feels like, and whether the route suits couples, families, and thoughtful first-time guests.

trustPoints.title: Halal-vetted experiences
trustPoints.description: Tours are written with transparent halal notes instead of vague labels, so guests know what has been checked and where they may want to ask more.

trustPoints.title: Culture over cliché
trustPoints.description: The routes focus on architecture, neighborhoods, waterfront history, and good food rather than nightlife-heavy tourism patterns.

trustPoints.title: Premium but easy to use
trustPoints.description: Clear tour cards, thoughtful copy, and direct FareHarbor booking links keep the booking path quick without sacrificing trust.

valueSection.description: The launch experience is designed to feel like a boutique travel concierge: lighter on noise, stronger on signal, and ready for fast founder-led iteration.

points.title: Halal suitability is part of the experience design
points.description: Food-focused tours begin from halal confidence, and non-food routes still carry practical notes so guests are not left guessing.

points.title: Pacing that feels thoughtful, not rushed
points.description: Routes are framed around realistic walking times, welcoming neighborhoods, and experiences that feel calm rather than over-programmed.

points.title: A site structure ready for growth
points.description: The MVP uses structured JSON content, reusable components, and direct outbound booking links so new tours can be added without a CMS rebuild.
